name: Database Mass Export
description: Detects large database exports or dumps that may indicate data theft
query:
// Database Mass Export
// Large or frequent database dumps
events from database
where event_type in ("database_export", "database_dump", "bulk_select")
  or command contains "mysqldump" or command contains "pg_dump"
group by username, database_name
having count(*) > 3 or sum(rows_affected) > 100000
within 300 seconds
